series_metadata.series_description: Various Federal grants are awarded to eligible Child Nutrition Program sponsors. The Ohio Department of Education, Office for Child Nutrition provides oversight to the operation of the grant on a state level. Records include but are not limited to accepted and denied applications, surveys, scoring matrices, supporting documentation, and all official correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three years plus the current year after the conclusion of the grant. ; Electronic: Retain for three years plus the current year after the conclusion of the grant., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
